hyperedges.label: Deployment Architecture
hyperedges.description: Complete deployment stack: PM2 + Nginx + Docker (PostgreSQL + Evolution API) + SSL + deploy script

hyperedges.label: AI Integration Stack
hyperedges.description: Full AI pipeline: Gemini models with fallback chain, prompt engineering, double-check security, filtered history, autonomy levels

hyperedges.label: WhatsApp Connectivity Stack
hyperedges.description: Evolution API integration: instance management, QR code connection, webhook pipeline, message send/receive, event handling

hyperedges.label: Automatic Scheduling System
hyperedges.description: End-to-end scheduling: AI marker detection, service catalog lookup, travel time calculation, duration-based slot calculation, conflict checking, agenda CRUD, owner notification

hyperedges.label: Security & Compliance Stack
hyperedges.description: Multi-layer security: content moderation with blocklist, Gemini safety settings, double-check response filtering, grave content compliance with reporting, SOPS encryption for secrets, JWT authentication

hyperedges.label: Analytics & Monitoring Stack
hyperedges.description: Metrics collection: conversation volume, AI resolution rate, response times, service rankings, peak hours, client regions, daily evolution, dashboard caching strategy

hyperedges.label: Customer Management Stack
hyperedges.description: Full customer lifecycle: lead capture, lead qualification, address via ViaCEP, maps integration, editable appointments, post-sale, reminders

hyperedges.label: Authentication System
hyperedges.description: Dual auth flows: SSO via Controle Total/Supabase and local login with JWT, shared auth.users table

hyperedges.label: Frontend Pages
hyperedges.description: All SPA routes: landing, auth, onboarding (5 steps), dashboard, conversas, agenda (day/week/month), configuracoes (5 tabs), analytics, suporte, 404

hyperedges.label: Backend API Routes
hyperedges.description: All Express API route groups: auth, webhook, instances, messages, dashboard, agenda, data, analytics

hyperedges.label: Backend Services Layer
hyperedges.description: Core backend business services: messageHandler (submodules: AI, agendamento, media, DB, client), queue, postVenda, lembrete, leadQualificator

hyperedges.label: Database Schema
hyperedges.description: Complete PostgreSQL schema: shared tables (profiles, auth.users), app tables (conversations, messages, message_queue), AI config (ia_configs, business_hours), catalog (servicos_catalogo), scheduling (agendamentos), customer (clientes, leads), sales (orcamentos), audit (moderation_log)

hyperedges.label: Onboarding Wizard Flow
hyperedges.description: 5-step first-run wizard: About You, Business Info, Assistant Personality, WhatsApp Connection, Security Settings

hyperedges.label: External Integrations
hyperedges.description: All third-party services: Controle Total (ERP), Evolution API (WhatsApp), Google Gemini (AI), Supabase (Auth), ViaCEP (address lookup), Waze/Google Maps/Apple Maps (navigation)

hyperedges.label: Product Tier Features
hyperedges.description: Basic: AI response, scheduling, no prices. Complete: all Basic plus photo analysis, lead qualification, recurring discounts, prices visible

hyperedges.label: Brand & Design System
hyperedges.description: Brand identity: personality, design principles, accessibility requirements, typography (Sora), color strategy, impeccable skill for UI refinement

hyperedges.label: End-to-End Message Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Complete data flow from client WhatsApp message to AI response: Evolution webhook → backend parse → moderation check → AI processing → scheduling → owner notification

nodes.label: Atendente
nodes.description: WhatsApp AI receptionist that answers, triages, and schedules appointments automatically, integrated with Controle Total ERP

nodes.label: Controle Total ERP
nodes.description: ERP system that Atendente integrates with - shared database, SSO auth, service catalog boundaries

nodes.label: Evolution API
nodes.description: WhatsApp gateway API - manages instances, webhooks, message send/receive, QR code connection

nodes.label: Google Gemini AI
nodes.description: AI model provider - processes WhatsApp messages, generates responses, understands scheduling intents

nodes.label: Supabase Auth
nodes.description: SSO authentication provider - handles Controle Total SSO flow, JWT tokens, auth.users table

nodes.label: ViaCEP
nodes.description: Brazilian postal code lookup API - auto-fills address fields when CEP is entered

nodes.label: PostgreSQL 16
nodes.description: Relational database - stores all app data, shared with Controle Total, runs locally on VPS

nodes.label: SOPS + Age Encryption
nodes.description: Encryption for .env files using Age public key encryption for secrets management

nodes.label: React Frontend (SPA)
nodes.description: Single-page application built with React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind + shadcn/ui

nodes.label: Vite Build Tool
nodes.description: Frontend bundler - builds SPA assets with cross-origin support

nodes.label: Tailwind CSS
nodes.description: Utility-first CSS framework used for all styling

nodes.label: shadcn/ui
nodes.description: UI component library - cards, dialogs, sheets, buttons, inputs, badges, switches, accordions, tooltips, avatars, labels, separators

nodes.label: Sora Font
nodes.description: Google Font typeface used across the app, weights 100-800

nodes.label: Express Backend (port 5003)
nodes.description: Node.js Express API server in TypeScript - orchestrates Evolution API, Gemini AI, and database

nodes.label: Custom QueryBuilder
nodes.description: Database client replacing Supabase JS - direct pg pool access with JWT auth, both server and client variants

nodes.label: JWT Auth Middleware
nodes.description: Verifies JWT tokens with jwt.verify, extracts id/sub from payload, sets req.user

nodes.label: SSO Auth Flow (Controle Total)
nodes.description: User logs into Controle Total, clicks 'Atendente', redirected with token, AuthContext captures and saves to localStorage

nodes.label: Local Auth Flow (Direct Login)
nodes.description: POST /api/auth/login validates email+password, returns JWT signed with JWT_SECRET (7-day expiry)

nodes.label: Webhook Message Pipeline
nodes.description: Evolution API webhook → parse payload → instance lookup → fromMe check → group filter → config load → media handling → text extraction → conversation ensure → blocked check → store → moderation → AI processing → scheduling → notification

nodes.label: AI Message Processing Pipeline
nodes.description: Webhook → handleIncomingMessage → storeMessage → loadHistory → loadIaConfig → loadBusinessHours → loadServicos → generateResponse (Gemini) → sendAndStore → tryCriarAgendamento → notificarDono

nodes.label: Automatic Scheduling Flow
nodes.description: IA includes marker → regex captures → loads deslocamento_minutos → gets duracao_minutos → calculates hora_fim → inserts in agendamentos → returns with deslocamento → notifies owner via WhatsApp

nodes.label: Content Moderation Pipeline
nodes.description: Pre-filter blocklist → Gemini Safety Settings → prompt restriction → response generated → double-check security patterns

nodes.label: WhatsApp AI Receptionist
nodes.description: Core product concept - AI that answers, triages, and schedules clients automatically on WhatsApp 24/7

nodes.label: Automatic Appointment Scheduling
nodes.description: AI collects data, suggests time slots based on business hours, creates appointments with dynamic duration and travel time

nodes.label: Lite Service Catalog
nodes.description: Simple service registration with name, duration, price - enough for AI, avoids competing with Controle Total

nodes.label: Travel Time Configuration
nodes.description: Configurable average travel time - AI considers it when suggesting slots, owner notification includes departure forecast

nodes.label: Business Hours Configuration
nodes.description: Day/time config for all 7 days with toggle + time picker

nodes.label: Owner WhatsApp Notification
nodes.description: When AI schedules a visit, sends WhatsApp to owner with client, service, date, time, travel time

nodes.label: Visual Message Labels
nodes.description: Messages identified with assistant name ('Claudia') for AI responses and 'Você' for manual messages, distinct background colors

nodes.label: Block Contacts from AI
nodes.description: Family/friends numbers blocked from AI processing, messages discarded without storage, filter in conversation list

nodes.label: Analytics Dashboard
nodes.description: Metrics: conversation volume, AI resolution rate, average response time, top services, peak hours, client regions, daily evolution

nodes.label: Content Moderation
nodes.description: Automatic blocking of profanity, harassment, sexual content, gambling, scams with moderation log for compliance

nodes.label: Clean Message History
nodes.description: Messages with prohibited phrases filtered from history sent to Gemini, double-check security blocking

nodes.label: Editable Agenda
nodes.description: Manual appointment creation with full fields: name, phone, address, service, value, status, notes

nodes.label: Lead Qualification
nodes.description: Complete tier feature - automatic lead qualification from conversations

nodes.label: Photo Analysis
nodes.description: Complete tier feature - AI analyzes client photos for pre-diagnosis

nodes.label: Product Tiers (Basic/Complete)
nodes.description: Two subscription tiers: Basic (AI response, scheduling, no prices, no photo analysis) and Complete (full features including photo analysis, lead qualification, recurring discounts)

nodes.label: AppointmentSheet
nodes.description: Bottom sheet for creating/editing appointments with all fields

nodes.label: Dashboard Page
nodes.description: Main dashboard with metrics and next steps

nodes.label: Conversas (Chat) Page
nodes.description: Real-time chat interface with AI/manual toggle, message history, contact blocking

nodes.label: Agenda (Calendar) Page
nodes.description: Calendar with day/week/month views, appointment management, dynamic timelines

nodes.label: Configuracoes (Settings) Page
nodes.description: Tabbed settings: IA config, business hours, WhatsApp instances, service catalog, integrations

nodes.label: Analytics Page
nodes.description: Detailed analytics dashboard with charts and metrics

nodes.label: Suporte (Support) Page
nodes.description: Dynamic FAQ with module grid, categorized FAQs, category navigation, support channels

nodes.label: Landing/Index Page
nodes.description: Product marketing landing page - introduces Atendente as WhatsApp AI receptionist

nodes.label: Auth Page
nodes.description: Login and registration page

nodes.label: Onboarding Wizard
nodes.description: 5-step onboarding: SobreVoce, Negocio, Assistente, Conexao, Seguranca

nodes.label: 404 Not Found Page
nodes.description: Fallback route for unknown paths

nodes.label: AppLayout
nodes.description: Main app shell with sidebar, header, bottom nav (mobile), and content area

nodes.label: Sidebar
nodes.description: Desktop navigation sidebar

nodes.label: Header
nodes.description: Top navigation header bar

nodes.label: BottomNav
nodes.description: Mobile bottom navigation bar

nodes.label: ProtectedRoute
nodes.description: Route guard requiring authentication

nodes.label: PhoneMockup
nodes.description: Phone UI mockup component for product presentation

nodes.label: HorariosConfig
nodes.description: Business hours configuration for all 7 days

nodes.label: InstanciasConfig
nodes.description: WhatsApp instance management: connect/disconnect, QR code display

nodes.label: CatalogoConfig
nodes.description: Service catalog CRUD: name, duration, price, active toggle

nodes.label: AgendaIntegracoesSection
nodes.description: Map integration links: Waze, Google Maps, Apple Maps in agenda

nodes.label: DayTimeline
nodes.description: Day view of agenda with hourly timeline

nodes.label: WeekTimeline
nodes.description: Week view of agenda

nodes.label: MonthTimeline
nodes.description: Month view of agenda with day grid

nodes.label: MonthYearNav
nodes.description: Month/year navigation controls for agenda

nodes.label: DayCarousel
nodes.description: Carousel for days in agenda mobile view

nodes.label: FAQList
nodes.description: Dynamic FAQ items listing

nodes.label: FAQCategoryNav
nodes.description: Category navigation for FAQ sections

nodes.label: ModulesGrid
nodes.description: Grid of product feature modules for support page

nodes.label: SupportChannels
nodes.description: Support contact channels display

nodes.label: MessageHandler
nodes.description: Main AI pipeline service: processes incoming messages, orchestrates conversation history, AI response, scheduling, and notifications

nodes.label: MessageHandler AI Submodule
nodes.description: AI response generation, prompt building, model fallback logic

nodes.label: MessageHandler Agendamento Submodule
nodes.description: Appointment creation from AI marker, regex parsing, duration/travel calculation

nodes.label: MessageHandler Media Submodule
nodes.description: Audio and image handling for incoming WhatsApp messages

nodes.label: MessageHandler DB Submodule
nodes.description: Database operations for messages, conversations, history loading

nodes.label: MessageHandler Client Submodule
nodes.description: Evolution API client calls for message sending

nodes.label: Message Queue Service
nodes.description: Queue for pending WhatsApp message sends with rate limiting

nodes.label: PostVenda (Post-Sale) Service
nodes.description: Automatic post-sale follow-up messages

nodes.label: Lembrete (Reminder) Service
nodes.description: Automatic appointment reminders via WhatsApp

nodes.label: LeadQualificator Service
nodes.description: Automatic lead qualification from conversations (Complete tier)

nodes.label: Evolution API Client
nodes.description: HTTP client for Evolution API REST endpoints - instance management, message sending, webhook config

nodes.label: Gemini API Client
nodes.description: Google Gemini client with prompt building, retry logic, model fallback chain, safety settings

nodes.label: Products Library
nodes.description: Product tier definitions and entitlement checks (Basic/Complete)

nodes.label: Moderation Library
nodes.description: Content moderation blocklist with categories: pedophilia, terrorism, profanity, harassment, sexual content, gambling, scams

nodes.label: Server Configuration
nodes.description: Environment variable loading and validation

nodes.label: Server Entry Point
nodes.description: Express app initialization, middleware setup, route mounting on port 5003

nodes.label: Auth Routes
nodes.description: Endpoints: login, register, check-email, me

nodes.label: Webhook Routes
nodes.description: Evolution API webhook receiver - handles MESSAGES_UPSERT and CONNECTION_UPDATE events

nodes.label: Instances Routes
nodes.description: WhatsApp instance CRUD - create, connect (QR), disconnect, status check

nodes.label: Messages Routes
nodes.description: Conversations and messages CRUD, history retrieval

nodes.label: Dashboard Routes
nodes.description: Dashboard metrics endpoint: conversations today, AI resolution, pending, WhatsApp status

nodes.label: Analytics Routes
nodes.description: GET /api/analytics/geral - detailed analytics with configurable period (default 30 days)

nodes.label: Agenda Routes
nodes.description: Availability slot calculation, appointment scheduling, conflict checking

nodes.label: Generic Data Routes
nodes.description: Generic CRUD proxy for database tables via /api/db/:table

nodes.label: profiles table
nodes.description: User profile data, shared with Controle Total

nodes.label: auth.users table
nodes.description: Authentication users, shared with Controle Total via Supabase

nodes.label: account_products table
nodes.description: Products contracted per account (Basic/Complete)

nodes.label: evolution_instances table
nodes.description: WhatsApp instances connected to Evolution API

nodes.label: conversations table
nodes.description: Open chats with clients - status (active/archived/blocked), ai_resolved flag

nodes.label: messages table
nodes.description: Full message history with ai_processed, from_me flags

nodes.label: message_queue table
nodes.description: Pending messages queue for controlled send rate

nodes.label: ia_configs table
nodes.description: AI behavior config: autonomy_level, collect_*, custom_instructions, greeting, closing, deslocamento_minutos

nodes.label: business_hours table
nodes.description: Day-specific open/close times for all 7 days

nodes.label: servicos_catalogo table
nodes.description: Service catalog: nome, duracao_minutos, valor_padrao, ativo

nodes.label: agendamentos table
nodes.description: Appointments with hora_inicio, hora_fim (dynamic), observacoes (includes travel time)

nodes.label: orcamentos table
nodes.description: Approved budgets from post-sale flow

nodes.label: clientes table
nodes.description: Clients captured by AI with address and contact info

nodes.label: leads table
nodes.description: Qualified leads (Complete tier)

nodes.label: moderation_log table
nodes.description: Content moderation audit log: content_hash, motivo, acao, reportado_autoridade

nodes.label: Waze Navigation
nodes.description: Quick map navigation link in agenda appointments

nodes.label: Google Maps Navigation
nodes.description: Quick map navigation link in agenda appointments

nodes.label: Apple Maps Navigation
nodes.description: Quick map navigation link in agenda appointments

nodes.label: Gemini Model Fallback Chain
nodes.description: Fallback: gemini-2.5-flash → gemini-2.5-flash-lite → gemini-flash-latest, each with 2 retries of 15s, 500ms backoff

nodes.label: AI Autonomy Levels
nodes.description: Three levels: full (IA completa atendimento), screening (IA tria antes de responder), manual (IA só sugere resposta)

nodes.label: Prompt Engineering Strategy
nodes.description: Persona + rules + hours + services + autonomy + custom instructions injected as first chat message (not systemInstruction), confirmation expected

nodes.label: Double-Check Security
nodes.description: Two-layer check: gemini.ts filters response patterns, messageHandler.ts rechecks before storing - prevents prohibited phrases from being sent

nodes.label: BAD_PATTERNS History Filter
nodes.description: Filters prohibited phrases from history sent to Gemini so AI never receives negative examples

nodes.label: Dashboard Cache Strategy
nodes.description: sessionStorage cache for dashboard status, 30s polling, three-state WhatsApp (Connected/Disconnected/Unavailable), fallback to cached data on API failure

nodes.label: PM2 Process Manager
nodes.description: Manages atendente-api process (fork mode, port 5003), auto-restart, pm2 save

nodes.label: Nginx Reverse Proxy
nodes.description: Routes /api/ to localhost:5003, /webhook to localhost:5003, serves static assets with CORS headers

nodes.label: Docker Compose
nodes.description: Container orchestration for PostgreSQL 16 and Evolution API services

nodes.label: Deploy Script (deploy.sh)
nodes.description: Builds frontend, rsyncs to production server at root@187.127.12.245:/var/www/atendente/

nodes.label: SSL/HTTPS
nodes.description: TLS termination for atendente.controletotal.app domain

nodes.label: Clear Cache Utility Page
nodes.description: Self-contained HTML page that unregisters service workers, deletes caches, clears localStorage/sessionStorage, then redirects to /

nodes.label: Main Landing HTML
nodes.description: index.html entry point with cache control headers, SEO meta tags, OG tags, service worker cleanup, Sora font, theme-color #1a56db

nodes.label: Target Users: Self-Employed Service Providers
nodes.description: Electricians, plumbers, painters, masons - use WhatsApp all day, no secretary, lose messages or take too long to respond

nodes.label: App Route Structure
nodes.description: React Router routes: / (Index/landing), /auth, /onboarding, /app/dashboard, /app/conversas, /app/agenda, /app/configuracoes, /app/suporte, /app/analytics, * (404)

nodes.label: Gravel Content Compliance
nodes.description: Pedophilia/child exploitation/terrorism: block + don't store text (only metadata + hash), report to authorities (Delegacia/Disque 100/SaferNet)

nodes.label: Human Intervention via WhatsApp
nodes.description: When owner sends from WhatsApp: if existing conversation → store + set ai_resolved=false + pause AI; if new conversation started by owner → discard

nodes.label: AI Resolution Metric (ai_resolved)
nodes.description: Column in conversations - starts true, set false when human intervenes, used to calculate AI resolution percentage

nodes.label: Impeccable UI Design Skill
nodes.description: Design skill with 20+ commands (craft, shape, critique, audit, animate, etc.) for frontend interfaces, brand register, color/typography/layout/motion guidance

nodes.label: Brand Personality
nodes.description: Innovative, bold, intelligent. Vanguard tone, surprising, techy but accessible. Confident without arrogance. Direct without being dry. 'Looks like magic, but it's just good tech.'

nodes.label: Design Principles
nodes.description: 1. Looks like magic but is real. 2. Trust without exaggeration. 3. Straight to the point. 4. Distinct, not template.

nodes.label: Accessibility Requirements
nodes.description: WCAG AA minimum (4.5:1 contrast), prefers-reduced-motion support, pt-BR throughout, minimum 16px font on mobile inputs

nodes.label: Onboarding: StepSobreVoce
nodes.description: About you step - personal information collection

nodes.label: Onboarding: StepNegocio
nodes.description: Business info step

nodes.label: Onboarding: StepAssistente
nodes.description: Assistant personality and name configuration

nodes.label: Onboarding: StepConexao
nodes.description: WhatsApp connection via QR code

nodes.label: Onboarding: StepSeguranca
nodes.description: Security settings step

nodes.label: QR Code WhatsApp Connection
nodes.description: Evolution API generates QR code at /instances/:id/connect, displayed in frontend for scanning, 30-attempt limit

nodes.label: Message Queue System
nodes.description: Queue for outgoing WhatsApp messages, ensures controlled send rate, backed by message_queue table

nodes.label: Evolution Webhook Events
nodes.description: MESSAGES_UPSERT (new/edit messages) and CONNECTION_UPDATE (connection state changes) sent to POST /webhook

nodes.label: Instance Naming Convention
nodes.description: atd_[first 12 chars of account_id] - e.g. atd_8991d4b23ab4
